sections.title: Building this archive
sections.body: Most of my recent free hours have gone into the site you're reading. It's an experiment in keeping a record — essays, books, movies, people, places — that's mine to shape rather than a feed someone else owns. The performance audit branch I'm on now is shaving the page weight down so it loads fast even on bad hotel Wi-Fi.

sections.title: Reading deliberately
sections.body: Trying to finish one book before starting the next. Currently working through long-form non-fiction on attention, money, and craft. Notes land on the books page when they're worth keeping.

sections.title: Health reset
sections.body: Cut alcohol and most processed food for the year. Lifting four days a week, walking everywhere I reasonably can. Goal is less about a number and more about staying useful at 40, 50, 60.

sections.title: Work in motion
sections.body: Spending most professional hours on finance, real-estate development, and the spaces where technology bends those industries. Open to interesting conversations — say hi.
